# kemp_replace_header_rule (Data Source)

Reads a system-level replace-header rule by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "kemp_replace_header_rule" "existing" {
  name = "rewrite-location"
}

output "replacement" {
  value = data.kemp_replace_header_rule.existing.replacement
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Rule name.

### Read-Only

- `header` (String) Header field the rule operates on.
- `only_on_flag` (Number)
- `only_on_no_flag` (Number)
- `pattern` (String) Pattern matched within the header value.
- `replacement` (String) Replacement string.
